JWTTokenApi.lookupN)
TokenRedisa
    The TokenRedis plugin expects the format of the data in a form of json.
    
    Prepare data with:
        redis-cli set hello '{"host":"127.0.0.1:5000"}'
    
    Verify with:
        redis-cli --raw get hello
    
    Spawn a test "server" using netcat
        nc -l 5000 -v
    
    Note: you have to install also the 'redis' and 'simplejson' modules
          pip install redis simplejson
    c
z%TokenRedis backend initilized (%s:%s)r%
zKThe provided --token-source='%s' is not in an expected format <host>:<port>
Tpackage redis or simplejson not found, are you sure you've installed them correctly?)
redis
simplejsonr-
_server
_portr0
exitrW

response from redis : %sr@
host: %s, port: %s)

client
stuffZ
